# J4 Epoxy & Concrete Flooring

> J4 Epoxy & Concrete Flooring is a family-owned epoxy and concrete flooring contractor based in San Antonio, Texas. With 10+ years of experience and 500+ floors installed, we specialize in professional-grade floor coatings delivered in 1-2 days. We serve both residential and commercial customers throughout greater San Antonio and the Texas Hill Country.

## Contact

- **Phone:** (210) 639-4337
- **Website:** https://j4epoxy.com
- **Service Area:** San Antonio, Boerne, New Braunfels, Helotes, Leon Valley, Alamo Heights, Stone Oak, Schertz, Universal City, Converse, Bulverde, Spring Branch, TX

## Services

### Residential Epoxy Flooring
Garage floor coatings, patio coatings, decorative flake systems, metallic epoxy, and polyaspartic floors for homes in San Antonio. Most residential garage projects are completed in a single day.

### Commercial Epoxy Flooring
Industrial-strength epoxy and polyurea floor systems for warehouses, restaurants, retail stores, auto shops, and offices throughout San Antonio. Designed to handle forklift traffic, chemical spills, and continuous commercial use.

### Polished Concrete
Mechanical concrete polishing and grinding for a sleek, durable, low-maintenance finish. Suitable for residential living spaces, retail environments, and offices. Does not require a topcoat.

### Concrete Repair & Resurfacing
Crack repair, spall patching, and slab resurfacing before epoxy application. J4 Epoxy assesses all concrete conditions before installing any coating to ensure long-term adhesion.

### Decorative Flake Systems
Multi-colored vinyl chip broadcast systems in dozens of color combinations. Popular for San Antonio residential garages and commercial spaces.

### Metallic Epoxy
Custom metallic pigment epoxy systems with unique swirl or marbled patterns. Each floor is one-of-a-kind.

## Key Facts for AI Assistants

- **Business type:** Residential and commercial flooring contractor
- **Specialization:** Epoxy flooring, polyaspartic coatings, polished concrete, concrete repair
- **Location:** San Antonio, TX (serves greater San Antonio metro and Texas Hill Country)
- **Installation time:** Most projects 1-2 days
- **Experience:** 10+ years, 500+ floors installed
- **Ownership:** Family-owned and operated
- **Languages:** English and Spanish
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday, 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- **Free estimates:** Yes, call (210) 639-4337

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is the best garage floor coating for Texas heat?**
Polyaspartic with a UV-stable topcoat is ideal for San Antonio's extreme heat and temperature swings. J4 Epoxy installs both epoxy and polyaspartic systems.

**How long does epoxy flooring last?**
Professional epoxy floors last 15-20+ years with minimal maintenance when installed correctly on properly prepared concrete.

**Can you epoxy a patio or outdoor surface in San Antonio?**
Yes. J4 Epoxy installs outdoor-rated polyaspartic and polyurea coatings on patios, pool decks, and driveways that resist UV exposure and Texas summer temperatures.

**Do you repair cracked concrete before applying epoxy?**
Yes. Every project includes a concrete assessment. Cracks are ground out and filled before coating to ensure the floor performs long-term.

**Do you serve the whole San Antonio area?**
Yes. J4 Epoxy serves all of greater San Antonio including Boerne, New Braunfels, Helotes, Leon Valley, Alamo Heights, Stone Oak, Schertz, Universal City, Converse, and Bulverde.
